hindi: नमो नमो दीनबन्धो, नमो नमो जगद्गुरो।
english: Salutations to the friend of the humble, salutations to the world-teacher
roman: Namo namo Dina bandho namo namo Jagad guru

hindi: नमो नमो पाण्डुरङ्ग, विटोबा मायबाप तू॥
english: Salutations to Panduranga, you are Vithoba, mother and father
roman: Namo namo Panduranga Vithoba maya bap tu

english: Vithala the friend of the humble, Namadeva and Tukaram
Janabai, Eknath, the dark one of Pandharpur

hindi: भक्तों के दुख हर्ता, पंढरपुर में राजे।
english: Remover of devotees' pain, enthroned in Pandharpur
roman: Bhakton ke dukh harta Pandharpur mein raaje

hindi: रुक्मिणी के स्वामी, चरण कमल पर भ्राजे॥
english: Lord of Rukmini, shining at the lotus feet
roman: Rukmini ke swami charan kamal par bhraaje

english: O friend of the humble, victory to Vithala
roman: Dina bandho Dina bandho jaya jaya Vitthal

english: O dweller of Pandharpur, Hari Hari Govinda
